description: CompositionBlue, high collar t-shirt with buttoned chest placket, made of 100% cotton, has rugged appliqué work on left chest, stitch detailing, split hem ends, rubber print branding on left sleeve and comes with an extra buttonFittingMuscleWash careHand wash separatelyUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingDo not dry in sunlightDo not iron on print/embroideryStylish to the T, this cotton t-shirt from basics looks all the more cool with its rugged appliqué and stitch detailing along the placket, minus the collar. Team this with jeans and sports shoes and flaunt your well toned muscles in all glory.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
